---
name: 功能建议 / Feature Request
about: 提出新功能或改进建议 / Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**功能描述 / Description**
<!-- 清晰简洁地描述你想要的功能 / A clear description of the feature you'd like -->

**使用场景 / Use Case**
<!-- 描述你遇到的问题或使用场景 / Describe the problem or scenario this would address -->

**建议方案 / Proposed Solution**
<!-- 如果有的话，描述你期望的实现方式 / If you have ideas on how it could be implemented -->

**替代方案 / Alternatives**
<!-- 你考虑过的其他方案 / Other solutions you've considered -->

**补充信息 / Additional Context**
<!-- 其他有助于理解需求的信息、截图等 / Any other context, screenshots, etc. -->
